message: Jake
Cindy
Gloria
came to her house, but
she was not there.
Surely,
she’s gone out looking for her.
I thought it was someone else, but it's you.
Hello.
You know that she’s not here.
Yeah,
I've met her.
So, what do you want today?
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
System
About the surroundings.
About　that.
About　this.
About　her.
Save
End the game.
Considering that the room's owner is a teenage girl, this room, lacking even a hint of feminine taste, might be a bit unusual.
If I said that,
there's not a hint of the smell of life; it feels like a hotel room where one can leave anytime.
It's.
Probably a room assigned for monitoring. The fact that she doesn’t feel attached to the room must be because of that.
There’s hardly anything that suggests she has been in the room.
Is she feeling irritated with me? The atmosphere is tense.
Indeed,
To you, I probably look like a scammer who’s just snatching away the income I should rightly have.
I was just an ordinary girl.
Is it an agent who's nurtured her to this point?
She really only looks like a normal woman.
She has the vibe of a working wife who’s thinking about having kids soon.
It seems she’s in shock over the disappearance. It’s hard to believe it’s an act.
Really.
Do you not know where she is?
Hold on a sec.
Has she disappeared?
I’ve been talking about something close to that for a while.
No way, where could she possibly be?
Isn’t she with that young guy?
No, she hasn’t been seen since yesterday evening.
Oh no! I’ll try to look into things.
I’ll let you know if I find anything too.
Okay, please do.
I can’t believe I’m letting a guy into this room.
You’re talking pretty normally today, surprisingly.
Cut the jokes. I’m just a bit anxious.
But where could Shindey have gone?
What on earth brought her all the way here? There has to be a reason.
No,
I was thinking maybe has not come here.
hasn't come back at all. The last time I saw her was at that dreadful place, interrupted by someone.
You’re asking what she plans to do about work, right?
She says she doesn’t want to return to work now.
Who knows how it’ll turn out.
Yeah, that girl is indeed saying things like that.
Seems like she just doesn't care anymore.
Really hasn’t come here?
She hasn’t. As long as I’m here, I wonder if that girl will ever come back?
What on earth happened?
What happened, you ask? Nothing.
Nothing at all.
Oh, if you say something happened, I guess it's just that we were working together. I can't think of anything else.
Really? Tim and.
I think he has quite a bit of resentment towards you.
Those two harbor resentment for everything that doesn’t acknowledge them. Young people are like that, aren't they?
If you run into her, tell her I want to talk to her once.
I thought for sure.
that.
you were bringing her, but seeing you so down, maybe not?
and.
I'm curious about what happened between you two, but it seems like I won’t get any answers.
It's rare for us to have spoken properly until today; maybe that just means she's feeling weak?
I thought she would be here, but it seems she isn't.
If that's the case,
where on earth did she go?
I thought she must have been forced back home, skipping a mother-daughter meeting.
I figured that was it.
※※※ It’s a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
